overall.description: Cinematic game footage showing a slow ascent up the grand exterior staircase of a fantasy palace with ornate stone architecture and spires. The camera reveals a panoramic view of a distant city and mountains surrounded by lush greenery under a bright blue sky, with characters appearing at the terrace level.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone staircase on palace exterior

agents.ego_description: slowly climbing the stone staircase alongside the palace wall

entered.detail: ornate stone wall with decorative carvings and ivy covering sections
wide stone staircase with decorative balustrades ascending the palace exterior
tall Gothic spires and towers rising above the palace structure
dense green foliage and trees surrounding the palace grounds
red tiled roof of a lower building visible at the bottom of the frame
mountain range visible in the background under blue sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the lower section of a grand stone staircase attached to a palace wall. The camera ascends steadily alongside ornate stone architecture with Gothic spires rising above. Lush green trees fill the left side while a red terracotta roof is visible in the lower right, with distant mountains under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: mid-level palace staircase with expanding vista

events.description: red terracotta roof exits frame as camera ascends higher
panoramic view of distant city and valley becomes fully visible to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing to climb the staircase with the landscape opening up to reveal the valley view

entered.detail: decorative stone balustrades lining the upper palace terraces
panoramic view of a distant town with red roofs nestled in the valley

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues ascending the staircase, the red roof disappears from view and the scene opens to reveal a panoramic vista of a distant city nestled in a valley surrounded by mountains. Stone balustrades of the upper terraces become visible on the right while the palace spires remain prominent above.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace terrace with statues and flower gardens

events.description: camera reaches the top of the staircase and enters the open terrace level
NPC characters become visible walking on the terrace and stairs

agents.ego_description: reaching the top of the stairs and entering the palace terrace area where other figures are present

notable_agents.action: figure in dark clothing walking along the terrace platform
second figure ascending the stairs in the distance

entered.detail: ornate stone statues and sculptures decorating the terrace balustrades
bushes with purple flowers lining the terrace edge
wide open terrace platform at the top of the staircase with decorative stonework

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the top of the staircase and enters a wide terrace adorned with stone statues and purple flowering bushes. The view opens fully to the distant city and mountains. Several NPCs are seen walking along the terrace, and the grand staircase exits the frame as the camera moves onto the platform.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent up a grand palace staircase that gradually opens into a sweeping panoramic vista of a distant city. It begins at the lower section of the stairs, moving steadily alongside ornate Gothic spires and lush greenery while a red terracotta roof is visible below. As the camera climbs higher, the roof disappears and the perspective expands to reveal a wide valley where a city nestles among towering mountains. The scene then shifts as the camera reaches the summit, transitioning from the narrow climb to a wide terrace adorned with stone statues and purple flowering bushes. Finally, the staircase exits the frame as the camera moves onto the platform, revealing NPCs walking across the terrace against the backdrop of the distant horizon.
